zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 姐妹，你上周剪的那个大学生期末周发疯的短视频是不是爆火了啊？

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 对啊我自己都懵了，昨天一觉醒来发现点赞量直接冲到了八十万。
zh.highlight: 点赞量直接冲到了八十万

zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 我的天也太厉害吧！我发了快半年的美妆内容都没这么高的热度。

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 我也是瞎猫碰上死耗子，本来就是拍着玩发给我室友看的，谁知道会被这么多人刷到。

zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 现在这种共情力强的内容真的很容易一下子传播开对吧？

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 对啊，我现在后台都被私信挤爆了，好多人催我出后续系列呢。

en.speaker: A
en.text: Girl, did your short video about college students losing their minds during final exam week that you posted last week **go viral**?

en.speaker: B
en.text: Yeah I'm totally blown away too, I woke up yesterday to find the number of likes had hit 800,000 straight up.

en.speaker: A
en.text: Oh my god that's so awesome! I've been posting beauty content for almost half a year and never got that much attention.

en.speaker: B
en.text: It was just a total fluke, I originally shot it for fun to show my roommates, I never expected it to be seen by so many people.

en.speaker: A
en.text: Content that resonates with people super easily spreads far and fast these days, right?

en.speaker: B
en.text: Exactly, my inbox is flooded with private messages now, so many people are urging me to release follow-up series.
en.highlight: inbox is flooded with private messages

definitions.en: (of online content such as videos, posts, images) to spread rapidly and widely across the internet, gaining huge popularity in a short time
definitions.zh: （视频、帖子、图片等网络内容）在互联网上快速广泛传播，短时间内获得极高人气，爆火、走红

definitions.en: (of a virus, disease or infectious agent) to spread quickly among a large number of people
definitions.zh: （病毒、疾病等传染源）在大量人群中快速传播、流行

examples.en: The 15-second cute cat short video went viral overnight, gaining more than 10 million views across platforms.
examples.zh: 这条15秒的萌猫短视频一夜爆火，在各平台累计获得了超过1000万的播放量。

examples.en: His sarcastic comment on the unreasonable company policy went viral on the workplace forum last week.
examples.zh: 他对公司不合理政策的吐槽上周在职场论坛上爆火了。

examples.en: Health authorities are taking strict measures to prevent the new variant from going viral nationwide.
examples.zh: 卫生部门正在采取严格措施，防止新型变种病毒在全国范围传播开来。

synonyms.zh: （消息、内容等）迅速传播、不胫而走

antonyms.zh: 缺乏关注度、没什么热度

collocations.zh: 在全球范围内爆火传播
